response.overview: In the vibrant town of Nipa Hia Mmoa, Kwadae, a struggling boutique owner, faces an uphill battle against the tides of misfortune. His once-thriving shop has become a mere shadow of its former self, plagued by financial difficulties and an insatiable loan shark named Atsu, who looms over him like a storm cloud. Following a devastating burglary that strips him of his remaining inventory and savings, Kwadae finds himself teetering on the edge of despair, drowning in mounting debts and feeling utterly defeated.
response.title: The Funeral of Kwadae
